title: sphaeranthus neglectus
intro: Sphaeranthus neglectus, also known as the desert marigold, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and distinctive spherical flower heads. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, derived from its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Sphaeranthus neglectus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, making it a potential treatment for various conditions such as arthritis and high blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture or infused in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
